user_prompt: My gravity generator is ready for cooling
prayer:
Approach the gravity generator with solemn reverence, beseeching its ancient Machine Spirit to embrace the cooling rite.
Anoint the sacred heat sinks and coils of the gravity generator with blessed cryogel, invoking the Omnissiah's eternal chill.
Initiate the cooling operation through sanctified vents, channeling holy refrigerants into its blessed conduits.
Chant the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium as flux stabilizes within the gravity generator's core.
Verify the Machine Spirit's quiescence via auspex harmonics, praising the Machine God's mercy.

Kneel before the data-slate, invoking the Omnissiah to awaken its data-spirits for synchronization.

Commence the synchronization operation, linking its holy noospheric tendrils to the greater cogitator choir.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of datum and flux to harmonize in perfect alignment.
Seal the rite with the Canticle of Data Unity, confirming the data-slate's blessed coherence.

Test the anvil's tempered spirit through percussive diagnostics, glorifying its renewed vigor.
